summary: Big Blue stage decomp PR focused on data cleanup and small source-shape changes in src/melee/gr/grbigblue.c, with symbol split updates and a small type/header change. Bot report says the PR added 2 new matches, including fn_801EF60C and grBigBlue_801EACE8, and improved .data and several grbigblue functions.

key_files.role: Main Big Blue source changes: data declarations, stage data placement, report/assert literal cleanup, helper extraction, local code-shape tweaks, and matching-oriented expression/declaration changes.
evidence_refs: changed_files: src/melee/gr/grbigblue.c added 233 deleted 116 hunks 32
diff: grBb_803E2938 changed from zeroed u8 array to u16 data table
diff: grBb_StageData report_format removed and OSReport/__assert calls changed to inline strings
diff: static inline int randi(int max) added and repeated HSD_Randi zero checks replaced
text_corpus: bot report lists grbigblue code/data match improvements

key_files.role: Symbol/data ownership updates for Big Blue .data, splitting larger grBb/lbl objects into strings, 2-byte arrays, local jump tables, and resized objects.
evidence_refs: changed_files: config/GALE01/symbols.txt added 18 deleted 4 hunks 1
diff: grBb_803E2D20 resized 0x58 to 0x34
diff: grBb_803E2D78 resized/specified as 0xC data:string
diff: new lbl_803E2D54, grBb_803E2D84, grBb_803E2DC0, lbl_803E2DFC, string labels, and grBb_803E2ED8

key_files.role: Header/type surface touched; exact content not present in loaded diff excerpt.
evidence_refs: changed_files: src/melee/gr/types.h added 5 deleted 0 hunks 1

what_changed.text: Updated Big Blue .data symbols and sizes in config/GALE01/symbols.txt, splitting previously broad data objects into more specific string, 2-byte, local, and global symbols.
evidence_refs: diff: symbols.txt hunk around grBb_803E2D20 through lbl_803E3090

what_changed.text: Converted grBb_803E2938 from a zeroed u8 blob into an explicit u16 table and added explicit s16 arrays grBb_803E2D84, grBb_803E2DC0, and lbl_803E2DFC.
evidence_refs: diff: grBb_803E2938 u8[0xA8] replaced by u16 initializer
diff: static s16 arrays added before grBigBlue_801E6364

what_changed.text: Moved grBb_803E2D14 and grBb_803E2D20 later in the file and removed report_format from grBb_StageData, with OSReport sites using inline format/file strings instead of offsets into data blobs.
evidence_refs: diff: grBb_StageData no longer contains char report_format[0x24]
diff: OSReport("%s:%d: couldn t get gobj(id=%d)\n", "grbigblue.c", 0x17E, id)

what_changed.text: Cleaned several raw report/assert data references into literal report strings and __assert arguments.
evidence_refs: diff: OSReport("*** Not Set Position!(FFlyer)\n"); __assert("grbigblue.c", 0x6CB, "0")
diff: OSReport("*** Not Set Position!(Tyukei)\n"); __assert("grbigblue.c", 0x7CA, "0")

what_changed.text: Introduced a small static inline randi helper for the repeated pattern of returning HSD_Randi(max) when max is nonzero and 0 otherwise.
evidence_refs: diff: static inline int randi(int max) added
diff: repeated HSD_Randi conditional blocks in grBigBlue_801EA05C replaced with randi(...)

what_changed.text: Made matching-oriented source-shape changes: PAD_STACK size changed, local declaration/assignment order adjusted, 0.5f multiplications expressed as division by 2, some constants changed to hex or explicit float sentinel literals, and one assignment changed to a u32 pointer cast.
evidence_refs: diff: PAD_STACK(0x1c) to PAD_STACK(0x14)
diff: expressions using * 0.5f changed to / 2
diff: cam bounds locals split into declarations then assignments
diff: GET_GROUND(...)->gv.bigblue.xD0 = 0 changed to *(u32*) &... = 0

smart_moves.text: Data cleanup was used to unblock matching: the PR body explicitly says data cleanup got the PR over the bump, and the bot report shows .data improved by +264 bytes plus 2 new code matches.
evidence_refs: human_pr_text: data cleanup gets us over the bump for a couple of these
text_corpus bot report: .data +264, fn_801EF60C 100%, grBigBlue_801EACE8 100%

smart_moves.text: Inline strings replaced pointer arithmetic into data blobs at report/assert sites, reducing dependence on broad data objects and aligning with literal ownership cleanup.
evidence_refs: diff: OSReport format and file string literals in grBigBlue_801E59F8
diff: FFlyer and Tyukei report/assert literal replacements

smart_moves.text: Repeated random-with-zero-guard logic was factored into a local inline helper rather than duplicated at each call site.
evidence_refs: diff: static inline int randi(int max)
diff: multiple randi(timer_range) and randi(speed_range) replacements

decomp_lessons.lesson: For stage TUs with broad anonymous data blobs, splitting symbol ownership into strings, typed arrays, and correctly sized objects can unlock both .data progress and nearby function matches.
evidence_refs: human_pr_text: data cleanup gets us over the bump
diff: symbols.txt splits grBb_803E2D78/grBb_803E2EB8 area into multiple typed symbols
text_corpus bot report: .data 52.36% to 66.17%, 2 new matches

decomp_lessons.lesson: When report/assert strings are ordinary literals exposed by prior data blobs, replacing offset-based data references with direct source literals can simplify source and data ownership.
evidence_refs: diff: OSReport((char*) grBb_803E2938 + 0x41C, ...) replaced by OSReport literal format
diff: OSReport/__assert literal replacements for FFlyer and Tyukei

decomp_lessons.lesson: Small local helpers may recover authored-looking repeated idioms if they match codegen, as shown by replacing repeated HSD_Randi zero guards with randi(max).
evidence_refs: diff: static inline int randi(int max) added
text_corpus bot report: grBigBlue_801EA05C improved 98.14% to 99.28%

naming_conventions.text: The PR mostly preserves address-style Big Blue data names such as grBb_803E2D84, grBb_803E2DC0, lbl_803E2DFC, and grBb_803E2ED8 rather than inventing semantic names for newly split data.
evidence_refs: diff: new symbols and static arrays use address-style grBb_/lbl_ names

naming_conventions.text: A small semantic local helper name, randi, is used for a clearly local random-number wrapper.
evidence_refs: diff: static inline int randi(int max)

assembly_or_matching_tactics.text: Data-section tactic: resize/split symbols in config/GALE01/symbols.txt and mirror those splits in C declarations to improve .data and code references.
evidence_refs: diff: symbols.txt .data object splits
diff: grBb_803E2938/grBb_803E2D84/grBb_803E2DC0/lbl_803E2DFC C declarations
text_corpus bot report: .data +264

assembly_or_matching_tactics.text: Source-shape tactic: adjust expression spelling from multiplication by 0.5f to division by 2 in several geometric width/height calculations.
evidence_refs: diff: half_top.x, half_bot.x, left_x, bounds right, half_h, and grBigBlue_801EACE8 expressions

assembly_or_matching_tactics.text: Stack/codegen tactic: PAD_STACK changed from 0x1c to 0x14 in grBigBlue_801EA05C.
evidence_refs: diff: PAD_STACK(0x1c) to PAD_STACK(0x14)

assembly_or_matching_tactics.text: Declaration/order tactic: camera bound locals were changed from initialized declarations to separate declarations followed by assignments.
evidence_refs: diff: cam_left/cam_right/cam_bot/cam_top declarations in grBigBlue_801EA05C

assembly_or_matching_tactics.text: Bit-pattern tactic: StageCallbacks numeric constants were written as 0x40000000 and 0x80000000 instead of decimal literals.
evidence_refs: diff: StageCallbacks constants changed from 40000000/80000000 to 0x40000000/0x80000000

review_feedback.text: No human review comments were included in the loaded PR slice.
evidence_refs: metadata_json: review_comments 0, reviews 0

review_feedback.text: Automated report showed +0.03% matched code, +1256 bytes, 2 new matches, and 12 improvements in unmatched grbigblue items.
evidence_refs: text_corpus: decomp-dev[bot] report for GALE01

follow_up_queries: grbigblue data cleanup symbols grBb_803E2D84 grBb_803E2DC0

notes: The diff evidence is truncated, so later parts of src/melee/gr/grbigblue.c and the exact src/melee/gr/types.h changes are not visible in the loaded slice.
No human review comments were present, so reviewer intent and requested changes cannot be inferred.
The bot report supports match/improvement outcomes but does not prove every individual source-shape change was necessary.
Some retained tactics, such as PAD_STACK and raw pointer casts, are visible but should not be generalized as accepted style without further objdiff/build context.

accepted_candidate_records.title: Big Blue data cleanup can unlock code and .data matches
accepted_candidate_records.text: In PR #2714, splitting Big Blue .data symbols and replacing broad data blob references with typed arrays/literals coincided with .data improvement and two new grbigblue matches.
evidence_refs: human_pr_text: data cleanup gets us over the bump for a couple of these
diff: symbols.txt .data splits
text_corpus bot report: 2 new matches and .data +264

accepted_candidate_records.title: Local inline helper for repeated HSD_Randi zero guard
accepted_candidate_records.text: PR #2714 introduced static inline randi(max) to express repeated 'max != 0 ? HSD_Randi(max) : 0' logic in grBigBlue_801EA05C.
evidence_refs: diff: static inline int randi(int max)
diff: repeated conditional HSD_Randi blocks replaced
text_corpus bot report: grBigBlue_801EA05C improved

source_update_candidates.title: grbigblue.c data cleanup and symbol splitting affected matching
source_update_candidates.text: For src/melee/gr/grbigblue.c, PR #2714 split Big Blue .data symbols in symbols.txt, added typed arrays/literals in C, and the bot report showed .data improvement plus new matches for fn_801EF60C and grBigBlue_801EACE8.
evidence_refs: metadata_json: PR #2714 changed grbigblue.c and symbols.txt
diff: Big Blue symbol splits and typed C data
text_corpus bot report
source_update_candidates.reason: Useful path-scoped historical context for future grbigblue matching work.

source_update_candidates.title: Do not overgeneralize PAD_STACK and raw cast tactics from this PR
source_update_candidates.text: PR #2714 visibly used matching-oriented tactics including PAD_STACK size adjustment and raw pointer casts, but the slice only provides bot match deltas, not isolated evidence that those tactics are broadly appropriate.
evidence_refs: diff: PAD_STACK(0x1c) changed to PAD_STACK(0x14)
diff: *(u32*) &GET_GROUND(...)->gv.bigblue.xD0 = 0
decomp_standards: matching-tactics-need-evidence
source_update_candidates.reason: Curator may want to keep this as cautionary example material rather than a positive standard.

rejection_notes: Do not infer that gp->u.carnull accesses are a preferred Big Blue convention from this slice alone; the types.h hunk is not loaded and current source context was not inspected.
Do not promote expression spelling changes such as '/ 2' versus '* 0.5f' into a global rule; here they are only observed matching tactics in one PR.
Do not claim human reviewer approval of any tactic; there were no loaded human review comments.
